name: AgentOps Beads Issue Tracking Canary
description: Offline public canary for bd/beads issue-tracking behavior, ao beads parsing and degradation logic, shared/Codex beads skill contracts, current bd JSON health probes, and RPI tasklist fallback behavior.

cases.title: ao beads command logic tests pass
cases.objective: Protect bead ID parsing, bd show parsing, citation extraction, stale citation classification, missing-bd degradation, audit clustering, and closed-bead learning rendering.

cases.title: RPI survives unavailable or non-epic beads paths
cases.objective: Protect tasklist-mode prompts, execution-packet handoff, retry prompts, latest-epic parsing, and post-phase processing that depends on bd output.

cases.title: shared and Codex beads skill contracts validate
cases.objective: Protect live-bd source-of-truth rules, tracked export refresh guidance, parent-child reconciliation, broad parent handling, conditional Dolt push guidance, and current migration/version probes in both runtime skill copies.

expectations.value: cli reference avoids stale migrate inspect json command
cli reference documents machine-readable version probe

cases.title: installed bd exposes current JSON health probes
cases.objective: Protect the latest-version and database health paths with commands that emit JSON, while allowing migration inspect and embedded-mode doctor output to remain human-readable.

inputs.shell: bd version && bd upgrade status --json | jq -e '.current_version and (.schema_version == 1)' >/dev/null && bd status --json | jq -e '.schema_version == 1 and (.summary.total_issues >= 0)' >/dev/null && (bd doctor --json >/tmp/agentops-bd-doctor.json 2>/tmp/agentops-bd-doctor.err || true; jq -e '.schema_version == 1 and (.cli_version | length > 0) and (.checks | type == "array")' /tmp/agentops-bd-doctor.json >/dev/null || rg -q 'not yet supported in embedded mode' /tmp/agentops-bd-doctor.err) && bd migrate --inspect >/tmp/agentops-bd-migrate-inspect.txt && rg -q 'Schema Version:' /tmp/agentops-bd-migrate-inspect.txt

cases.title: docs do not advertise stale bd migrate inspect JSON command
cases.objective: Prevent agents from piping human-readable bd migration inspection output into jq after seeing a stale --json example.

inputs.shell: ! rg -n 'bd migrate --inspect --json' skills/beads/references/CLI_REFERENCE.md skills-codex/beads/references/CLI_REFERENCE.md docs/troubleshooting.md && rg -q 'bd upgrade status --json' skills/beads/references/CLI_REFERENCE.md skills-codex/beads/references/CLI_REFERENCE.md docs/troubleshooting.md && rg -q 'bd migrate --inspect' skills/beads/references/CLI_REFERENCE.md skills-codex/beads/references/CLI_REFERENCE.md docs/troubleshooting.md

cases.title: agent instructions preserve bd as the task tracker
cases.objective: Keep repo onboarding, lifecycle rules, and troubleshooting tied to bd instead of markdown task lists or stale direct JSONL decision-making.

expectations.value: Do NOT use markdown TODOs, task lists, or other tracking methods.
reconcile the open parent in the same session
Treat live `bd` reads (`bd ready`, `bd show`, `bd export`) as authoritative
RPI falls back to tasklist mode
